properties.displayName: Deploy App Service (Web App) HTTPLogs diagnostic settings to CSTRM Eventhub
properties.description: Deploys AppServiceHTTPLogs diagnostic settings for Azure App Service (Web App) resources to (ensure all http requests are captured and centrally logged) a CSTRM Eventhub when any App Service (Web App) which is missing this diagnostic settings is created or updated.
nonComplianceMessages: App Service (Web Apps) logging doesn't meet AA SCCF benchmark: App Service diagnostic settings HTTP logs should be sent to the approved CSTRM EventHub. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
